rulings.Case Title: ROBERT A RATTI ET AL VS. RONALD J RATTI SR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Awarding Plaintiffs Costs And Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 12, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF ROBERT RATTI, JOAN RATTI Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Awarding Plaintiffs Costs And Attorneys Fees is GRANTED as requested in the amount of $100,404.73. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: NIKKI MARKMAN VS. YUN ZHEN WANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Site Inspection After Objections From Defendants Yue Zhen Wang And Pei Yun Shen; Request For Sanctions Against Defendants Yue Zhen Wang And Pei Yun Shen And Their Attorney, Jimmie Williams, In The Amount Of $885
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 12, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF NIKKI MARKMAN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Site Inspection After Objections From Defendants Yue Zhen Wang And Pei Yun Shen; Request For Sanctions Against Defendants Yue Zhen Wang And Pei Yun Shen And Their Attorney, Jimmie Williams, In The Amount Of $885 is moot. Moving party in the supplemental brief agreed that virtual inspection was sufficient. Parties shall not be using any evidence regarding the contents of the cabinets, drawers or closets, which Plaintiff was not allowed to inspect. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: NIKKI MARKMAN VS. YUN ZHEN WANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Site Inspection Fter Response Form Defendant Ying Shen
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 12, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF NIKKI MARKMAN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Site Inspection After Response Form Defendant Ying Shen is moot. Moving party in the supplemental brief agreed that virtual inspection was sufficient. Parties shall not be using any evidence regarding the contents of the cabinets, drawers or closets, which Plaintiff was not allowed to inspect. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THUY TIEN CAPITAL INC. DBA BOBO DRINKS VS. 235 JEFFERSON STREET LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reclassification To Unlimited Civil Case
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 12, 2020 line 3. PLAINTIFF THUY TIEN CAPITAL INC. DBA BOBO DRINKS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reclassification To Unlimited Civil Case is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. VS. DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 12, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT KEESHEMAH JOHNSON DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The Court notes that Plaintiff also failed to file an opposition to the demurrer to the original complaint. =(501/CFH)
